creator: santhosh.raju@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 200755
Patch to upgrade the ports script to support cliqz-1.24.0 builds.

Cliqz has been updated from version 1.23.3 to 1.24.0.

I have made a patch that makes changes to the ports script to support building cliqz-1.24.0.

It would be nice if the patch can be applied to the ports tree of FreeBSD.

Thank you
Santhosh
